title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. schmidtiiforme
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. schmidtiiforme is a lesser-known species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically a type of hawkweed. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. schmidtiiforme include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for skin conditions such as acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried herb or infused in oil to create topical creams and salves, which can be applied directly to the affected area for relief.
